creator: eric@madrid.lol
text:
(In reply to Mark Linimon from comment #1)

root@bsd53:~ # pkg search php72-pecl-mon
php72-pecl-mongodb-1.5.2       PECL classes for MongoDB

root@bsd53:~ # pkg search php73-pecl-mon
php73-pecl-mongodb-1.5.2       PECL classes for MongoDB

The port for PHP 7.2 & 7.3 to MongoDB connector 
was compiled without the following:
libmongoc SSL
libmongoc crypto
libmongoc SASL
libmongoc compression snappy

In the mongodb.conf I enabled authorization

/usr/local/etc/mongodb.conf

security:
  authorization: "enabled"

And added a admin password to the MongoDB system

I need the above options enabled as part of the compiling of the port

I can do it in a variety of Linux distros and, 
I would do it myself but I'm not finding much on BSD customizing ports.

Thank you for your help!

Eric.
